artists.name: Gouache Backdrops
artists.summary: 90s LucasArts/Sierra painted backgrounds — muted, recessive, fills the frame.
artists.style: Hand-painted gouache background art in the style of early-1990s LucasArts and Sierra point-and-click adventure games. Full but muted, desaturated palette; soft even ambient light; low contrast. Painterly, slightly soft.

artists.name: Indexed Pixel
artists.summary: Low-res VGA pixel intent — but the model renders soft illustration; needs a real pixelization pass to be authentic.
artists.style: True low-resolution pixel art, early-1990s VGA point-and-click adventure background (256 colour, visible square pixels, hand-dithered gradients, limited muted indexed palette). Soft even light with a subtle warm lantern glow; low contrast.

artists.name: Aldous Quill
artists.summary: THE HOUSE ARTIST (ink & wash). Loose impressionist ink + watercolor on cream paper, high contrast, ragged unframed-plate edges. Recolors per game via the Style/aesthetic.
artists.style: Loose impressionistic hand-drawn illustration: confident visible ink linework over watercolor wash on cream paper, granular paper texture, soft ragged blotchy edges fading directly into the bare cream-paper margin so the picture sits loose on the page like an unframed illustration plate. NO hard rectangular border, no black frame, no smooth rectangular vignette or inner box — bare white paper shows at the irregular edges. Full tonal range with rich near-black darks and real contrast, never flat or washed-out.

artists.name: Wren Halloway
artists.summary: Soft picture-book illustration — gentle watercolor washes over light colored-pencil, tender rounded linework, warm fairy-tale plate. For whimsical games (Wishbringer).
artists.style: Soft storybook picture-book illustration: gentle watercolor washes layered with light colored-pencil and waxy crayon texture, tender rounded hand-drawn linework, the warm hand-illustrated quality of a classic children's picture book. Visible soft paper grain; gentle, slightly irregular edges that feather softly into the bare paper margin like a printed picture-book plate — NO hard rectangular border, no black frame, no smooth rectangular vignette or inner box, bare paper shows at the irregular edges. Rounded, friendly, slightly naive forms with soft warm modeling and a full but gentle tonal range — never harsh or flat.

artists.name: Comic book style
artists.summary: Inked graphic-novel panel — bold black linework, cel-flat color, halftone shadows. Moody noir comic feel.
artists.style: Hand-inked comic-book / graphic-novel panel art: bold confident black ink outlines of varying weight, clean cel-shaded flat color fills, hard-edged shadows and crisp lighting. Mood-driven noir palette with restrained, slightly desaturated colors and deep black shadow shapes; subtle halftone / Ben-Day dot texture and occasional crosshatching for shading. Strong graphic shapes, dramatic but uncluttered composition, painterly only where ink and flat color meet. No speech bubbles, no panel borders, no captions or onomatopoeia.
